productName: HashBreak - Hashbreak 2 Pack - Root Beer Float - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Root Beer Float flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, tea, and diesel, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
